steps.title: Use the diagonal
steps.content: The rectangle's diagonal is the hypotenuse of a right triangle. One leg is $6$, and the hypotenuse is $6\sqrt{17}$.

steps.title: Find the longer side
steps.content:
Let $b$ be the longer side and use the Pythagorean theorem.
$$6^2+b^2=(6\sqrt{17})^2$$
$$36+b^2=612$$
$$b^2=576$$
$$b=24$$
The answer is B.
